_comment: Conditions that cause a ticket to be skipped without processing

skipConditions.description: HTML target is an H1 tag
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — H1 tag changes are out of scope.

skipConditions.description: HTML is an iframe or embed element
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — iframe/embed elements are out of scope.
⚠️ Automation skipped — w-embed element. Not editable via API. Needs manual Webflow Designer edit.

skipConditions.description: Request is a photo or image change
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — image changes are not yet automatable.

skipConditions.description: Request is a page removal or element deletion
skipConditions.check: newValue is empty or implies deletion
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — page/element removal is out of scope.

skipConditions.description: New value cannot be inferred from the ticket
skipConditions.check: newValue is vague (e.g. 'update from website', 'see attachment')
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — new value not inferrable from ticket.

skipConditions.check: selector inside section.faqs-section AND element is h2 'Questions? We have the answers!'
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — static FAQ heading is hardcoded, not editable via API.

skipConditions.description: Multiple program-page tickets requesting different values for the same Locations field
skipConditions.check: multiple tickets targeting same Locations item with different values
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — conflicting Locations field values across tickets. Manual resolution required.

skipConditions.description: Static element could not be located via Data API
skipConditions.comment: ⚠️ Automation skipped — static element not found via Designer API. Needs manual Webflow Designer edit.
